<!-- Thanks for contributing to AIEOS. AIEOS is an operating system: changes are
     validated, not just reviewed. Fill this in honestly — the conformance checker
     (`npm test`) is the gate, and the same checks run in CI. -->

## What this changes

<!-- A concise description. Link the entities/companies touched. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New company or entity (inherits the framework; passes conformance)
- [ ] Framework change to the kernel / a shared contract / the standard library (**requires a proposal first** — see below)
- [ ] Bug fix in a script or rule
- [ ] Docs / community files

## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `npm test` locally and it reports **0 error(s), 0 warning(s)** (CONFORMANT).
- [ ] **Propose before you build (Directive #7):** if this is a kernel, shared-contract, or standard-library change, a Framework proposal issue was opened, reviewed, and recorded *before* this PR. Linked below.
- [ ] **New entities** were created by copying the matching template (company / agent / council / workflow / register), with the identity block complete.
- [ ] Inherits rather than forks; any override is by name and only **stricter** (never weakens a law). Directive #11 left intact or stricter.
- [ ] No existing entity renamed or deleted; memory only appended.
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] Cross-links are relative and resolve.

## Linked proposal

<!-- Required for framework changes. e.g. "Closes #123" or "Implements #123".
     Leave blank for a new company/entity or a plain bug fix. -->
